evidence: The worst charm-pin entry had ES-VWAP 26.20, VWAP acceleration -0.015, pullback-from-high 9.75, rolling-high distance 14.75, no positive movement before MAE, and an 80.3 minute recovery, while protected extended-VWAP winners have median MAE around -14.9 and fast exits.
name: Charm Pin Early-Progress Tail Classifier
risk: A config-only static proxy may still block clean high-extension winners; a path-aware classifier must prove protected fast-winner retention before promotion.
trigger: charm_pin_pullback_long entries with high ES-VWAP extension or recent-high rejection that fail to show early positive progress after entry.
validation_metric: Reduce charm_pin_pullback_long worst MAE from -527 toward <= -403 while retaining >=90% charm-pin PnL and >=95% protected fast-winner count.

evidence: VALID_1DTE_ONLY produced 20 trades and $1305 PnL, but prior direct 1DTE breakout quality tightening reduced score and net profit. A companion profile may separate pullback/reclaim 1DTE states without bluntly tightening breakout_long_1dte.
name: 1DTE Pullback Companion Profile
risk: Router ordering may cannibalize profitable breakout_long_1dte entries, or the profile may be unreachable if trigger overlap is too narrow.
trigger: 0DTE unavailable, 1DTE map valid, and ES state resembles pullback/reclaim rather than breakout continuation.
validation_metric: Combined 1DTE PnL remains >= current $1305, 1DTE average MAE improves versus about -124, and total net profit remains >=98% of leader.
